ddls:
CREATE TABLE "diamonds" (
  "diamond_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diamond */,
  "carat" REAL /* Weight of the diamond in carats */,
  "cut_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cut quality of the diamond */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the color grade of the diamond */,
  "clarity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clarity grade of the diamond */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth percentage of the diamond */,
  "table" REAL /* Table percentage of the diamond */,
  "x" REAL /* Length of the diamond in mm */,
  "y" REAL /* Width of the diamond in mm */,
  "z" REAL /* Height of the diamond in mm */,
  "procurement_date" TEXT /* Date the diamond was procured */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the diamond was evaluated */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the diamond was sold */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the diamond (e.g., in inventory, on hold, sold) */,
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the certification details of the diamond */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* The price at which the diamond was purchased */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* The price at which the diamond was sold */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the supplier from whom the diamond was procured */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the current location of the diamond (e.g., warehouse, showroom) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who last modified the diamond record */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date when the diamond record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diamond_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diamonds_cut_id FOREIGN KEY ("cut_id") REFERENCES cuts ("cut_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diamonds_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diamonds_certification_id FOREIGN KEY ("certification_id") REFERENCES certifications ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diamonds_clarity_id FOREIGN KEY ("clarity_id") REFERENCES clarities ("clarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diamonds_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cuts" (
  "cut_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cut quality */,
  "cut_name" TEXT /* Name of the cut quality */,
  "cut_description" TEXT /* Description of the cut quality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cut_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color grade */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color grade */,
  "color_description" TEXT /* Description of the color grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clarities" (
  "clarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clarity grade */,
  "clarity_name" TEXT /* Name of the clarity grade */,
  "clarity_description" TEXT /* Description of the clarity grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clarity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "diamond_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diamond being certified */,
  "certifying_body" TEXT /* Body that issued the certification */,
  "certification_number" TEXT /* Certification number */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was issued */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* Date the certification is valid until */,
  "report_link" TEXT /* Link to the certification report */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* The date when the certification needs to be renewed */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* The status of the certification renewal (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_diamond_id FOREIGN KEY ("diamond_id") REFERENCES diamonds ("diamond_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., procurement agent, quality evaluator, sales representative) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "diamond_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diamond being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the diamond */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the diamond was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_diamond_id FOREIGN KEY ("diamond_id") REFERENCES diamonds ("diamond_id")
)
